criteria_verification.criterion_text: All unit tests pass without a live NATS server
criteria_verification.evidence: All 40 tests pass without NATS. InMemoryManifestRegistry used for registry tests. NATSKVManifestRegistry tests use unittest.mock.MagicMock/AsyncMock for KV bucket. Pure functions from _routing.py tested directly.
criteria_verification.notes: All 40 tests pass without NATS. InMemoryManifestRegistry used for registry tests. NATSKVManifestRegistry tests use unittest.mock.MagicMock/AsyncMock for KV bucket. Pure functions from _routing.py tested directly.

criteria_verification.evidence: make_mock_kv_bucket() factory in conftest.py creates a MagicMock with AsyncMock side_effects backed by a dict store. Used in test_kv_registry_persists_across_reconnect, test_kv_unavailable_graceful_failure, test_kv_registry_deregister_unknown_agent_ignored, test_kv_registry_get_unknown_agent_returns_none, test_kv_registry_empty_intents_rejected, test_kv_registry_find_by_intent, test_kv_registry_find_by_tool.
criteria_verification.notes: make_mock_kv_bucket() factory in conftest.py creates a MagicMock with AsyncMock side_effects backed by a dict store. criteria_verification.evidence: Coverage measured via pytest-cov: manifest.py 92%, _routing.py 98%, events/_fleet.py 100%, client.py KV registry lines (380+) 93%. All exceed the 90% threshold. The only uncovered client.py lines are the NATSClient class (network I/O) and the NATSKVManifestRegistry.create() classmethod which requires a live NATS connection.
